creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best hotel in Bangkok? 🇹🇭👇  DM me or comment “Bkkhotel” and I’ll send you a link to the hotel 🤝  I stayed at this incredible hotel earlier this year, and even though I’ve been to some great places since my stay here, I can’t stop thinking about this hotel in Bangkok 😅

I paid $167 / €157 per night for 2 people (including breakfast) in a Superior Panorama room 🤓

The hotel is called Eastin Grand Phaya Thai, and it’s located right next to Phaya Thai Station, from where you can take the train directly to Bangkok’s Suvarnabhumi Airport ✈️   Is this the best hotel in Bangkok? 👀  #bangkok #thailandtravel #hotelreview

transcription.text: If you're ever thinking about going to Thailand, you need to see this new hotel in Bangkok and wait until you see their insane breakfast buffet. As you know I'm a sucker for swimming pools and this place has got two of the best infinity pools I've ever been to. The main one has a restaurant and a bar and the top one has a more calm atmosphere. The hotel has its own walkway out to Paya Thai station so it's easy to get anywhere in Bangkok and you can also get the airport express train from here. Breakfast buffet is probably the craziest I've ever experienced anywhere. They had sushi, western style salads, hot Thai food and I also had to break my own rule of not going for hotel breakfast baked goods because these just looked so good and they were.
